question: will portugal win the fifa world cup 2026
reason: Portugal qualified for the 2026 World Cup but faces strong competition from top teams.
evidence: Portugal secured their spot by winning UEFA Group F in November 2025.
The 2026 World Cup features 48 teams, increasing the number of strong competitors.
Top teams like France, Brazil, and Argentina are also strong contenders.
